# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a simple GitHub Actions workflow for our application CI. On every push, install dependencies, run unit tests, build the application, and deploy to our staging environment. Focus on speed - we want fast feedback for developers. We'll add security scanning later.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Application CI Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - develop
      - 'feature/**'
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main
      - develop

concurrency:
  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: true

env:
  NODE_ENV: ci
  STAGING_URL: ${{ vars.STAGING_URL }}

jobs:
  install:
    name: Install Dependencies
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 20
          cache: npm

      - name: Cache node_modules
        id: cache-node-modules
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: node_modules
          key: node-modules-${{ hashFiles('package-lock.json') }}
          restore-keys: |
            node-modules-

      - name: Install dependencies
        if: steps.cache-node-modules.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
        run: npm ci --prefer-offline

  test:
    name: Run Unit Tests
    needs: install
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 20
          cache: npm

      - name: Restore node_modules cache
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: node_modules
          key: node-modules-${{ hashFiles('package-lock.json') }}

      - name: Run unit tests
        run: npm test -- --ci --coverage --maxWorkers=2

      - name: Upload test coverage
        if: always()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: coverage-report
          path: coverage/
          retention-days: 7

  lint:
    name: Lint Check
    needs: install
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 20
          cache: npm

      - name: Restore node_modules cache
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: node_modules
          key: node-modules-${{ hashFiles('package-lock.json') }}

      - name: Run linter
        run: npm run lint

  build:
    name: Build Application
    needs: [test, lint]
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 20
          cache: npm

      - name: Restore node_modules cache
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: node_modules
          key: node-modules-${{ hashFiles('package-lock.json') }}

      - name: Build application
        run: npm run build
        env:
          NODE_ENV: production

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-output
          path: dist/
          retention-days: 3

  deploy-staging:
    name: Deploy to Staging
    needs: build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' || github.ref == 'refs/heads/develop'
    environment:
      name: staging
      url: ${{ vars.STAGING_URL }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-output
          path: dist/

      - name: Deploy to staging server
        run: |
          echo "Deploying build artifacts to staging environment..."
          echo "Target: ${{ vars.STAGING_URL }}"
          # Replace with your actual deployment command, e.g.:
          # npx vercel deploy --prebuilt --token=${{ secrets.VERCEL_TOKEN }}
          # aws s3 sync dist/ s3://${{ vars.S3_BUCKET }} --delete
          # rsync -avz dist/ ${{ secrets.STAGING_SSH_USER }}@${{ secrets.STAGING_HOST }}:/var/www/app/
        env:
          DEPLOY_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_TOKEN }}

      - name: Verify deployment
        run: |
          echo "Running smoke test against staging..."
          # Replace with actual health check
          # curl --fail --retry 5 --retry-delay 5 "${{ vars.STAGING_URL }}/health"
          echo "Staging deployment verified successfully."

      - name: Notify deployment status
        if: always()
        run: |
          if [ "${{ job.status }}" == "success" ]; then
            echo "✅ Staging deployment succeeded for commit ${{ github.sha }}"
          else
            echo "❌ Staging deployment failed for commit ${{ github.sha }}"
          fi
          # Add Slack/Teams notification here if needed
          # curl -X POST "${{ secrets.SLACK_WEBHOOK }}" -d '{"text":"Deployment ${{ job.status }}"}'
